Manufacturer & Wholesale Exporter · 20+ Years

Handcrafted Ethnic Wear for Girls, Manufactured & Wholesaled to the World

Rani Girls Ethnic has been manufacturing girls' ethnic wear from Mumbai for over 20 years, supplying boutiques and retailers across the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, New Zealand and more with vibrant, festival-ready outfits — sized, packed and export-documented for a smooth reorder every season.

Why Buyers Reorder With Us

20+ Years of Manufacturing, Built for Wholesale

We manufacture every piece ourselves from our Mumbai facility, so quality and reorders stay consistent season after season.

01

Our Own Manufacturing

20+ years manufacturing girls' ethnic wear in-house — full control over quality, fit and consistency.

02

Export Ready

Invoicing, customs documentation and international shipping handled for every order.

03

Low MOQ

Start small and scale up — wholesale minimums built for boutiques, not just big-box buyers.

04

Full Size Range

Consistent sizing from 0 to 16 years, so parents keep coming back for the next size up.
